Name: 0_and_roblox_to_the
Representative_Docs:
['i have a story id like to share and this all happened today…
so basically i was playing a random buckshot roulette game on roblox and i was 1v1ing this random person and he started being so weird and like he said he was 25 and asked my age and i told him i was 13 and he continued being weird to me like for example he kept asking me questions like hair and eye color and “are you single” and stuff like that but i went along with it bc i was genuinely curious what he would do- it did not end up well… he was talking to me strangely like saying “ur cute” and saying suggestive crap. Eventually i had enough so i js asked him “are you okay with me being 13” and he said that’s perfectly fine because in the old days people would get married at 13 💀. i screenshotted sum of it including some weird stuff he was saying and i reported him and unfriended him and i left the game but i still kept his username: DarkieDecimator
pls if anyone sees this comment report that guy im actually disturbed by some of the crap he said
also tysm schlep for exposing people like this <3', 'Roblox is such a great game the games are so fun but the people on there have throughly traumatized me and others I know it’s just wrong on so many levels and we need to find ways to stop this and ban it from games that have so much potential to be a safe and happy community full of good things not inappropriate sexual things. It’s also so wrong to take insecurities people have and to take advantage of them faking and gaslighting them saying you “love” them. It’s so so so wrong and it is terrifying so f*cking terrifying and hurtful ik I’ve said this a lot but we as a community need to rid platforms of this!! Sexual harassment online is a real thing and it is not to be laughed about or ignored please please please stop behaviors like this I have experienced this myself I have an idea on what it’s like and it’s so scary to experience and we need to rid the world of these people. DO NOT ONLINE DATE AND DEFINITELY NOT ON ROBLOX!! predators are real and they are horrible and I’m so glad people are trying to take a stand against the horrible people like this so thank you so much for doing this it really helps to see people trying. ❤❤', '(This is a controversial question and I am autistic, I’m just asking out of wanting to understand more..)
I’d like to start off by saying I am in no way saying these people are innocent, because what they are doing is very wrong, illegal, disgusting.. but I’d like to ask… “you were able to walk away anytime” maybe it’s because I try my best to see the good in people but.. the bad ones who NEED to be locked up would run.. the ones who realize their mistakes and get their wake up call would want to change and are all for change, but are then handed over to the police.. while yes they do have to pay for their crimes.. won’t they just feel frustrated when in jail..? I guess that is what you are trying to teach them, they should be frustrated with their decisions because it’s not right.. but if he chose to leave.. he wouldn’t have been talking to you guys, which means he would’ve gotten away… or would you chase after them? I’m just voicing my thoughts out there.. please don’t take this as me defending any of these people..

That being said! Please keep doing what you’re doing! Maybe roblox will finally put an end to all this..']
